posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have a board that is conected to another one.
I want to be able to add the same item from a connected board column in bulk, as many of my items are related to the same item from another board.
For example, as it would work with multiple deals that are related to the same customer.
I cannot do that from selecting all and add the item as this column seems not to be supported.

What are you trying to achieve

Connect multiple items at the same time to another item in another board through a connected boards column.
